description:
Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder

Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder
Full release notes: https://www.dyad.sh/docs/releases/1.6.2
What's Changed
- feat: move MCP server management to a new Plugins page by @RyanGroch in #3798
- Fix version restore and E2E flakes by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3828
- Revert "Bump Electron dependencies (#3802)" by @wwwillchen in #3838
- Fix Windows unit test path normalization by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3831
- Update pr push test workflow by @wwwillchen in #3844
- Auto-deny ignored pnpm builds by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3843
- Handle unavailable TypeScript checks by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3845
- Deflake custom pnpm install E2E by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3850
- Never lose safeStorage secrets: preserve locked ciphertext + legacy Keychain recovery (#3837) by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3849
- Add consented pnpm version migration upgrade by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3847
- Bump to v1.6.2 by @wwwillchen in #3852
- Fix safeStorage Keychain account lookup by @wwwillchen in #3854
- Add in-process macOS keychain reader by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3855
Full Changelog: v1.6.0...v1.6.2
